summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for infographic integration across G-Digital website. All 5 infographics successfully integrated and functioning correctly with proper accessibility and responsive design.
passed_tests: La Factoria page loads correctly with all 4 infographics integrated
Hero section Compliance Injection infographic displays on desktop, hidden on mobile
Deuda Legal section Iceberg infographic loads with proper alt text
Stack section Trust API architecture diagram visible on all devices
Legal argument section Inversion de Carga infographic responsive behavior working
Homepage Triangle of Legitimacy infographic displays correctly below 3 pillars
All existing pages functional: /, /contacto, /nosotros, /recursos and 5 solution pages
All 5 infographic images serve without 404 errors from /img/ directory
Images have proper descriptive alt text for accessibility
Responsive layout working - infographics hidden on mobile where appropriate (lg:hidden)
Navigation dropdown and mobile menu functionality intact
Image naturalWidth validation confirms successful loading
